title: SDN260MCLN-Case-8498157-Configuration Document
fullText: Configuration Steps: Add the code type 'T01' in the custom codes. Add the system code parameters as below. Based on the check below, the potential fix should work. Note: Please always add the code type and code id as “ T01 ” because it hardcoded in the code. If you provide any other values potential fix will not work.

chunks.text:
[Document: SDN260MCLN-Case-8498157-Configuration Document]

Configuration Steps: Add the code type 'T01' in the custom codes. Add the system code parameters as below. Based on the check below, the potential fix should work. Note: Please always add the code type and code id as “ T01 ” because it hardcoded in the code. If you provide any other values potential fix will not work.
